idea-plugin.name: FluentAutoGenerator
idea-plugin.description:
FluentAutoGenerator helps you create FluentMigrator migration boilerplate directly from Rider's Solution Explorer.

The plugin adds a FluentMigrator context menu for folders and generates ready-to-edit C# migration files using project and Git metadata.

What it generates

  • Forward only migration... creates a ForwardOnlyMigration class with an EmbeddedScript call.
  • Up/down migration... creates a standard Migration class with Up() and Down() methods.

How to use

  1. Open Rider and locate the target folder in Solution Explorer.
  2. Right-click the folder and select FluentMigrator.
  3. Choose Forward only migration... or Up/down migration....
  4. Enter a migration name in the dialog (a default is suggested from your current Git branch).
  5. The plugin creates a new .cs file in the selected folder and opens it for editing.

Notes

  • The migration attribute version is generated from the current UTC timestamp.
  • The migration description is filled with the active Git branch name when available.
